text:
Title: Unstoppable (2010)
Rated: PG-13
Runtime: 98 min
Genre: Action, Thriller
Actors: Denzel Washington, Chris Pine, Rosario Dawson
Plot: With an unmanned, half-mile-long freight train barreling toward a city, a veteran engineer and a young conductor race against the clock to prevent a catastrophe.

metadata.name: Unstoppable
metadata.actors: Denzel Washington, Chris Pine, Rosario Dawson

text:
Title: The Dark Knight (2008)
Rated: PG-13
Runtime: 152 min
Genre: Action, Crime, Drama
Actors: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart
Plot: When the menace known as the Joker emerges from his mysterious past, he wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham. The Dark Knight must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.

metadata.name: The Dark Knight
metadata.actors: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart

text:
Title: Inception (2010)
Rated: PG-13
Runtime: 148 min
Genre: Action, Adventure, Sci-Fi
Actors: Leonardo DiCaprio, Marion Cotillard, Tom Hardy
Plot: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.

metadata.name: Inception
metadata.actors: Leonardo DiCaprio, Marion Cotillard, Tom Hardy

text:
Title: Pulp Fiction (1994)
Rated: R
Runtime: 154 min
Genre: Crime, Drama
Actors: John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman
Plot: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster's wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

metadata.name: Pulp Fiction
metadata.actors: John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman

text:
Title: The Shawshank Redemption (1994)
Rated: R
Runtime: 142 min
Genre: Drama
Actors: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton
Plot: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

metadata.name: The Shawshank Redemption
metadata.actors: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton

text:
Title: Forrest Gump (1994)
Rated: PG-13
Runtime: 142 min
Genre: Drama
Actors: Tom Hanks, Robin Wright, Gary Sinise
Plot: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, and more unfold through the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75, whose simple outlook on life touches those around him.

metadata.name: Forrest Gump
metadata.actors: Tom Hanks, Robin Wright, Gary Sinise

Plot: With an unmanned, half-mile-long freight train barreling toward a city, a veteran engineer and a young conductor race against the clock to prevent a catastrophe.
